portalCreds.guideTitle: What to do on this page
portalCreds.step1: Register or log in on each university website
portalCreds.step2: Copy your account and password into the fields below
portalCreds.step3: Press Save on that program after you edit
portalCreds.cardSubheading: Agents use these to verify uploads. Only share credentials for portals you use.
portalCreds.instructionPrimary: Visit each university website using the Link column, register for that school's application portal, and enter your account and password on this page so your agent can log in later to verify uploads. If there is an Instructions link, open it and follow the steps. After entering credentials, click Update under each application to save.
portalCreds.instructionSecondary: Please share your universities' application portal credentials below. Your agent(s) can help you review your applications when you are blocked.
portalCreds.emptyState: There are no decided applications with portal links here yet. When a program is marked decided, it will appear in this list.
portalCreds.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
portalCreds.updateFailedAlert: Could not save portal credentials. Please try again later.
portalCreds.saveDisabledHint: Change account or password above, then press Save
portalCreds.saveEnabledHint: Save these credentials for this program
